steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify package contents including sprayer rack frame, straps, and mounting bolts.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify package contents including sprayer rack frame, straps, and mounting bolts.

steps.title: Position Base Plate
steps.content: Place base plate directly over trailer railing (open) or stud rib (enclosed). Mark drill holes.

es.title: Position Base Plate
es.content: Place base plate directly over trailer railing (open) or stud rib (enclosed). Mark drill holes.

steps.title: Bolt and Secure
steps.content: Drill and bolt frame into place. Wrap tension straps around sprayer tank and pull loop tight to lock it.

es.title: Bolt and Secure
es.content: Drill and bolt frame into place. Wrap tension straps around sprayer tank and pull loop tight to lock it.
